chosen_action.title: Dedupe repeated rerun-improvement work inside the same active hold window

why_this_action.summary: The active short review window still has no truthful do-now packet, but this hold window had already used slots on active_loop_prompt_repair and post_hold_reentry_contract_repair. Tightening the live cron contract again to forbid more same-window rerun/prompt tweaks was the highest-leverage way to preserve the remaining slot(s) for a genuinely different repair or executable lane.
shared_findings_used: marketing_execution_board_latest.md: no truthful do-now packet exists in the current review window
distribution_lane_latest.json: short review-window congestion clears at 2026-05-25T02:05:05
marketing_2026-05-24_234934_active_loop_prompt_repair.md: prompt-level rerun-improvement repair already executed in this hold window
marketing_2026-05-24_235759_post_hold_reentry_contract_repair.json: contract-level rerun-improvement repair already executed in this hold window

result.summary: Updated the live marketing-active-loop cron payload so a hold window that already contains both active_loop_prompt_repair and post_hold_reentry_contract_repair cannot spend another slot on more rerun/prompt tweaks.
